name: Sugato Mukhopadhyay
summary:
Software Engineer with 3+ years of experience building full-stack web applications using Java, JavaScript, HTML, and CSS.
Experienced with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure), Python, Git, Agile development, and relational databases. Currently pursuing
a Master s in Software Engineering to deepen technical expertise.

experience.title: Executed zero-downtime migration of 100+ production customer accounts to automated access key system in SpringBoot
experience.company: Honeywell Technology Solutions Limited : Software Developer
bullets: Executed zero-downtime migration of 100+ production customer accounts to automated access key system in SpringBoot
microservices; reduced operational overhead via key renewal automation and maintained full backwards compatibility.
Contributed to migration of 11 SpringBoot microservices and 100+ customer accounts to Microsoft Azure in 3 months;
resolved platform constraints, ensured zero-downtime cutover with full customer continuity.
Developed CLI-based bulk deployment system for 150+ remote IoT devices; reduced software update time from hours to
minutes, enabling rapid response to critical security threats.
Increased test coverage from 70% to more than 90% across SpringBoot (Mockito) and React (Jest) codebases; improved
code reliability by systematically writing unit and integration tests, exceeded team threshold.
Contributed to OPCUA protocol integration for industrial IoT devices with backend and frontend development; delivered
50% ahead of timeline, handled schema design and device command orchestration.
Resolved 100+ threat model issues across 11 microservices (avg. 20-40 per scan cycle) using BlackDuck Hub, Twistlock,
Coverity, and SD Elements; prevented vulnerabilities from reaching production.

experience.title: Gathered data from online sources for skin diseases and constructed a labeled dataset after thorough manual cleaning.
bullets: Gathered data from online sources for skin diseases and constructed a labeled dataset after thorough manual cleaning.
Applied data processing and oversampling techniques to train a robust model for Diabetic Retinopathy and performed
Trained models using deep learning in PyTorch with CNN architectures including ResNet, DenseNet, VGG, and Inception.
Achieved 96% validation accuracy for skin disease classification and 88.9% accuracy for diabetic retinopathy classification.

education: Arizona State University, Tempe, AZ Aug 2024 - May 2026
Master of Science in Software Engineering 4.0/4.0
Indian Institute of Technology, Kharagpur, India June 2016 - May 2020
projects: Elastic Face Recognition System (AWS IaaS: EC2, S3, SQS, SimpleDB, Autoscaling) Python Fall 2025 Coursework Project
Built a multi-tier, horizontally scalable system handling 1,000+ concurrent requests with average 110 ms latency.
Designed async inference pipelines using SQS + PyTorch to decouple compute-heavy workloads and maintain
Implemented autoscaling policies reducing compute cost during low-traffic periods while maintaining SLA during spikes.
Built a small admin dashboard to monitor pipeline state, improving visibility and enabling rapid iteration on new
Edge-Based Face Detection for IoT Devices (AWS IoT Greengrass, MQTT, Lambda, SQS) Fall 2025 Coursework Project
Designed an edge/cloud hybrid inference workflow, offloading MTCNN detection to IoT edge nodes for low-latency
Built MQTT-based communication flow with secure certificate-based authentication and multi-stage SQS pipelines.
Reduced upstream cloud compute load by detecting No-Face frames at the edge.
